schema_constraint_note: vec0 schema hardcoded to FLOAT[384] (packages/registry/src/schema.ts:218). 768-dim models require a schema migration before benchmarking. Out of scope for this WI.
run_environment: FuckGoblin cloud sandbox — HuggingFace network blocked; model downloads not possible

candidates.notes: Current default. General-purpose sentence embedding. SBERT score ~58.8 on MTEB.
BGE (BAAI General Embeddings) retrieval model. Designed for dense retrieval (similar to yakcc's use case). Outperforms MiniLM on MTEB retrieval tasks. Top recommended candidate.
candidates.run_status: NOT_RUN — HuggingFace download blocked in sandbox

candidates.notes: Microsoft E5 embedding model. Strong on MTEB retrieval benchmarks. Requires instruction prefix 'query: ' for queries (special preprocessing needed). Second recommended candidate.
candidates.run_status: NOT_RUN — HuggingFace download blocked in sandbox

candidates.notes: 12-layer variant of current model; same 384-dim output; generally +1-3pt over L6 on semantic similarity tasks.
candidates.run_status: NOT_RUN — HuggingFace download blocked in sandbox

candidates.notes: Trained for paraphrase detection. May not outperform all-MiniLM for code-spec retrieval. Lower priority.
candidates.run_status: NOT_RUN — HuggingFace download blocked in sandbox

candidates.notes: 768-dim model; requires schema migration (FLOAT[384] → FLOAT[768]). OUT OF SCOPE for this WI. File WI-V3-DISCOVERY-D6-DIM-MIGRATION if this WI's 384-dim results don't close the gap.

infrastructure_delivered.factory_param: createLocalEmbeddingProvider(modelId?, dimension?) now accepts optional params
infrastructure_delivered.local_known_models: LOCAL_KNOWN_MODELS exported from @yakcc/contracts — validated registry of offline-capable MIT/Apache models

recommendation: Run bge-small-en-v1.5 first (most promising for retrieval tasks). If M2 >= 70%: swap default in packages/contracts/src/embeddings.ts. If M2 < 70% across all 384-dim candidates: file WI-V3-CORPUS-FIELD-COVERAGE-EXPAND.
